title: State Capitals
description: How well do you know where the state capitals are?

rounds.clue: The capital of Alaska, this city can only be reached by boat or plane — no roads connect it to the rest of the state.
Sitting at exactly one mile above sea level, this Colorado capital is nicknamed the Mile High City.
Despite being the capital of the most populous US state, this city is not its largest — that honor goes to Los Angeles.
This Rhode Island capital is the smallest state capital by population in New England.
This Texas capital is famous for its live music scene and is home to the University of Texas Longhorns.
